name: Because The World Died
short_description: Retro pixel art RPG set in a dying world full of coldness, rats, and hard choices. Survive long enough to uncover your past... or die. Nonlinear narrative. Money and resources. Many endings. Zero mercy. Why? Because The World Died.
detailed_description:
You’re not a hero. 

You’re just someone who woke up in a cold, broken world: with no memory, no future, and maybe no hope.

Will you figure out who you were?
Will you survive long enough to matter?

Navigate a post-apocalyptic town filled with factions, decay, and uncomfortable choices. Hunt rats, sell their meat, go mad from hunger, or maybe-somehow start a business.
Violence is risky. Even rats can kill you.
Money talks. Water is a privilege. And death? Always an option.

Who are you, and do you even care about the answer?

Features

  • nonlinear story with many endings

  • companions with strong personalities

  • dark humor & grim choices

  • economy-focused survival (money and resources)

  • post-apocalyptic farming

  • rats. many rats. some hate you. one might love you.

  • grinding poverty and insanity

  • free demo included (first 3 days, saves compatible with the full game)
